series_metadata.series_description: Internal production reports and system generated reports from the Medicaid Management Information System (MMIS) that detail provider activity, the number of providers, the number of applications and enrollment registrations, provider assistance call summaries, number of claims reviewed, and the ombudsman training and meeting assignments that are held with provider groups.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 2 years and 3 years in the records center, then destroy provided audits are complete, reports released and all discrepancies are resolved. ; Electronic: Retain in office 2 years and 3 years in the records center, then destroy provided audits are complete, reports released and all discrepancies are resolved., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
